_format: Contractions that should be split into multiple Spanish words before tokenization. Keys are the contracted surface forms; values are either space-separated strings or arrays.
_intent: Step 2a (count_words) applies these substitutions at tokenize time. Each resulting token records source_surface=original contraction so the front-end can still display 'pa’l' on lyric cards. Per-word counts go to each expanded word; the original contracted form disappears from the vocabulary.
_note: Add regional/artist-specific multi-word contractions here rather than as individual mapping entries in elision_mapping.json (which is for single-word merges only).
